title: Gameplay loop and Route v2 lane
summary: Thirty-fifth structured packet for Eco Explorer. Lane 4 is a gameplay-loop cohesion lane that should turn outings into clearer cozy naturalist adventures through Route v2 conversions, one tiny pre-outing support choice, station-side notebook synthesis, and soft replay windows. The packet now carries the first forest pilot handoffs, the support-slot handoff, the notebook-return handoff, the transition-route conversion pack, the inland stress-and-exposure conversion pack, the thaw-edge alignment fix, the first expedition-as-chapter handoff that collapses Root Hollow into one place-led climb-and-return note instead of three legacy checkpoint requests, and the follow-up fix that makes Root Hollow's live clue sequence match that authored chapter copy.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the first Route v2 pilot conversion pack.
execution_order.why_now: The lane should start from concrete existing routes, not abstract theory.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the tiny outing-support slot handoff.
execution_order.why_now: One small player choice is the cleanest first gamification layer.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the notebook synthesis return flow.
execution_order.why_now: Route v2 only works if the finish step is calm, clear, and compact.

execution_order.goal: Implement the Route v2 core runtime.
execution_order.why_now: The lane needs one save-safe foundation before it converts real routes.

execution_order.goal: Review the Route v2 core runtime.
execution_order.why_now: The new core touches save, request, and station seams and needs an early safety check.

execution_order.goal: Convert Hidden Hollow and Moisture Holders to Route v2.
execution_order.why_now: The forest pair is the strongest first pilot for wayfinding plus evidence assembly.

execution_order.goal: Review the first Route v2 forest pilot.
execution_order.why_now: The first live outing loop needs a quality gate before the lane widens.

execution_order.goal: Add one tiny outing-support choice and route-aware today note.
execution_order.why_now: This is the smallest choice-and-anticipation layer that makes outings feel more like game sessions.

execution_order.goal: Review the support choice and soft replay note.
execution_order.why_now: The lane should only continue if those additions stay compact and calm.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the transition-route conversion pack.
execution_order.why_now: The next strongest proof is the middle-habitat comparison and transition pair.

execution_order.goal: Convert Scrub Pattern and Cool Edge to Route v2.
execution_order.why_now: These routes can best prove that the model works outside the forest starter pair.

execution_order.goal: Review the transition-route conversion.
execution_order.why_now: The middle-habitat phase should feel like observations and choices, not disguised counts.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the inland stress-and-exposure conversion pack.
execution_order.why_now: The inland branch should become the stronger second act of the season.

execution_order.goal: Convert the inland line to Route v2.
execution_order.why_now: This is the point where lane 4 proves the outing model can carry a broader chapter.

execution_order.goal: Review the inland Route v2 line.
execution_order.why_now: The inland branch should stay distinct, science-safe, and calm.

execution_order.goal: Force Short Season to cross the thaw edge for real.
execution_order.why_now: The new inland middle beat should feel spatial, not like a one-zone gather wearing Route v2 copy.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the first expedition-as-chapter handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Once outings feel coherent, the next step is to turn one expedition into a true chapter.

execution_order.goal: Rebuild Root Hollow as the first Route v2 chapter.
execution_order.why_now: Root Hollow is already the best live template for a fuller authored outing.

execution_order.goal: Review the first full Route v2 chapter.
execution_order.why_now: This is the gate for whether lane 4 has really made the game loop feel more like a game.

execution_order.goal: Make Root Hollow's live clue order match its chapter copy.
execution_order.why_now: The new chapter framing only holds if the expedition guidance stays truthful when players inspect clues out of order.

guardrails: Do not add combat, health, survival meters, or failure-state pressure.
Do not add a larger quest log, planner, or loadout screen.
Keep the support choice tiny and route-facing.
Reuse the existing station and replay seams instead of opening a parallel hint system.
Treat route completion as notebook synthesis plus gathered evidence, not as instant inspection counts.
acceptance_focus: Outings feel more purposeful and game-like without changing genre.
The station remains compact while gaining a tiny meaningful choice and payoff seam.
Route v2 grows from existing routes and chapters instead of replacing the whole game shell.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-4.md, docs/reports/2026-03-30-gameplay-loop-and-route-v2-lane.md, and this packet. Treat lane 4 as the gameplay-loop cohesion lane: retrofit a few strong outings into Route v2, add one tiny support choice, finish outings through notebook synthesis, and use replay seams to make the game feel more like a cozy naturalist adventure without adding a bigger quest shell.
